overall.description: A naval vessel navigates through stormy coastal waters at night, viewed from the ship's bridge with navigation displays visible. The scene features active radar systems, rough seas, and intermittent lightning strikes in this naval simulation game.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking stormy seas

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring the rotating radar and navigation charts while steering through dark coastal waters

entered.detail: leftmost screen showing coastal chart with landmasses and navigation data
center circular screen with rotating yellow radar sweep showing surrounding contacts
rightmost blue screen showing ship telemetry and system status
triangular bow structure of the vessel extending forward into the water
metal safety railing on the port side of the bridge view
metal safety railing on the starboard side of the bridge view
dark stormy water surrounding the vessel with visible wave motion

segments.scene_description: Navigating from the ship's bridge at night with active radar and navigation displays. The vessel moves steadily through dark coastal waters as storm conditions intensify around the bow.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge during active electrical storm

events.description: bright lightning strike illuminates the ocean surface and ship bow ahead
second lightning flash appears in the distance directly ahead of the vessel

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through heavy seas while monitoring the radar for obstacles during the electrical storm

segments.scene_description: Active lightning strikes illuminate the rough seas as the ship continues through the storm. The radar continues its sweep while large waves crash against the bow, briefly lit by the electrical flashes.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge continuing through storm conditions

agents.ego_description: continuing navigation through the stormy night, with occasional wave splashes visible against the railings

segments.scene_description: The vessel maintains its course through the turbulent coastal waters with navigation systems fully operational. The storm continues with reduced lightning activity as the ship progresses through the dark seas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous perspective from the ship's bridge as a vessel navigates through a darkening coastal storm that peaks in electrical intensity before settling into a steady, turbulent trek. It begins with a view of active radar and navigation displays as the ship moves steadily through dark waters while storm conditions intensify around the bow. As the weather worsens, frequent lightning strikes suddenly illuminate the rough seas, casting brief, sharp light over large waves crashing against the hull. The scene then shifts as the electrical flashes subside, though the vessel maintains its course through the remaining turbulence. Finally, the camera continues to track the ship's progress through the dark, churning coastal waters with the navigation systems remaining fully operational.
